facebook.caption:
POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and you almost skip Bếp Biển. Don't.

4.8 stars across 1,343 reviews. That's not luck. That's a kitchen doing something right, consistently.

Fresh seafood, Phu Quoc style. Show up hungry.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 1,343 people rated this 4.8 stars. Watch why. Bếp Biển on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the seafood stop locals keep coming back to. Add it to the list.

instagram.caption:
Walked past Bếp Biển twice. Third time I went in. 4.8★, 1,343 reviews. Should've gone sooner.

Tag your travel buddy.
